title: Urai et al 2019 Choice history biases subsequent evidence accumulation — data deposit
abstract: Code and data for Urai AE, de Gee JW, Tsetsos K, Donner TH (2018) Choice history biases subsequent evidence accumulation. eLife, in press. Raw data files, single-subject and group-level MAP estimates for all models described in the paper, single-trial timecourses of motion energy estimated from frame-by-frame dot coordinates, fits for all extended models.
out_of_scope_note: Figshare data deposit for Urai et al. 2019 eLife — code/data only, no findings of its own.
